race.description: Frankston Sand Soil & Mini Mix Mdn Plate
race.comment: FROM YESTERDAY (14) was firmly outclassed in Listed company last start at Flemington but pulled up with significant issues there having been given half a chance by the market. Have to forgive that, if he's got another good run this campaign he'll go close. WOLVES' DEN (10) ran a solid race first up here over 1400m when getting home late for fifth. He's expected to improve quickly off that and take holding out. ROYAL STORM (6) presents third up having been solid enough in two runs back, respecting from a good gate now at peak fitness. Giving a fluker's hope to HAYAI TSURU (11) first up for a new yard, her best could be good enough to sneak into the first four at massive odds.
